text:
In the first scene, I sense sterility and emptiness—a quiet corridor where the ordinary elements of a building exist in anticipation of purpose. It feels transitional, as if I am pausing between places or thoughts.

In the second scene, vibrant colors and intriguing displays awaken my curiosity. Surrounded by the motifs of research and progress, I feel intellectually energized, as if participating in an unfolding story of discovery and technological evolution. The world here welcomes reflection and wonder.
